seoTitle: St Andrews vs St Clair — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Andrews and St Clair. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Andrews vs St Clair: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Andrews and St Clair.
heading: St Andrews vs St Clair — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Andrews, New South Wales and St Clair, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Clair has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to St Andrews (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Andrews or St Clair safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Andrews has a flood risk score of 27/100, while St Clair scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Andrews scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. St Clair scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Andrews or St Clair?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Clair has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
